title: Inside Spain: How schools aren't equipped to deal with the early heat
summary: In this week’s Inside Spain, we look at how a group of teachers has set up a temperature-monitoring platform which exposes how many Spanish school buildings remain ill-equipped for early heatwaves, and the impact on teachers and pupils.

title: Would the EU take Britain back?
summary: A decade after the Brexit referendum, the UK is experiencing a form of "divorce regret" with surveys showing most Britons now believe leaving the European Union was a mistake.

title: Europe swelters in new heatwave with temperatures set to rise further
summary: Much of Western Europe was baking in a gruelling heatwave on Friday with the mercury expected to continue rising in the coming days, shattering temperature records.

title: Spain and UK make deal to digitally monitor British-led overtourism
summary: Amid peak summer travel and a simmering anti-tourism mood in the country, Spain's Tourism Ministry will work with British travel agents to better monitor tourism flows from the country.

title: Will Spain's amnesty cause a spike in irregular migration?
summary: Is there any evidence to suggest that Spain's current mass regularisation of migrants will act as a pull factor for more undocumented to enter the country in the months to come?
